root_cause: Init container is resource-starved and keeps OOM-killing before main startup
evidence: Init container 'init-migrate' lastState shows OOMKilled before the current CrashLoopBackOff
Main container 'payments-api' has not started and remains waiting: PodInitializing
First BackOff retry for init container 'init-migrate' began 8.0s after the recorded OOMKilled termination
Latest init container BackOff: Back-off restarting failed init container init-migrate in pod payments-api-pod_default(91af3c1b)
Init container memory request/limit: request=64Mi, limit=128Mi

causes.message: Init container 'init-migrate' performs bootstrap work before the main workload can start
Init container 'init-migrate' is repeatedly exhausting its runtime memory budget
Kubelet keeps retrying the failed init container instead of advancing to normal containers
Main container 'payments-api' remains blocked behind init container completion

pod:payments-api-pod: Pod is stuck in initialization because the init container cannot complete within its memory budget
container:payments-api: Main container is still waiting with reason PodInitializing

likely_causes: The init container memory limit is too low for migrations, decompression, or bootstrap data loading
A recent bootstrap script or image change increased peak memory usage during initialization
Node-level memory pressure is amplifying init-container startup memory spikes
suggested_checks: Review init-container memory requests and limits against real bootstrap usage
Inspect the init workload for data expansion, migrations, or cache warmup steps that spike memory
